identifier.description: A unique identifier for the resource, used to distinguish it from others.

role_arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the IAM role to assume when provisioning the resource. It's optional.

type_name.description: The name of the resource type you want to manage, such as 'AWS::S3::Bucket'.

type_version_id.description: The version ID of the resource type, used when you want to specify a particular version. It's optional.
